visible_product_cards.evidence: Page shows geo-redirect prompt: 'Hello! Choose a country.' with Canada and United States flags

blocking_signals.visible_text: Hello! Choose a country. | Canada | United States | Shopping in the U.S.A.?
blocking_signals.evidence: Geo-redirect page detected, blocking access to actual site content based on IP location
blocking_signals.impact: Cannot access product listings or details without selecting country
blocking_signals.suggested_handling: Select 'United States' to proceed, or use US-based proxy

recommended_action_plan.reason: Geo-redirect requires browser interaction to select country before accessing content
